name: media-control
description: Media playback control — Spotify, system volume, YouTube, and media keys
author: heliox-core

tools.name: spotify_play
tools.description: Play a song, artist, or playlist on Spotify

tools.name: spotify_pause
tools.description: Pause the currently playing Spotify track

tools.name: spotify_next
tools.description: Skip to the next track on Spotify

tools.name: spotify_now_playing
tools.description: Get information about the currently playing Spotify track

tools.name: volume_set
tools.description: Set the system volume to a specific percentage (0-100)

tools.name: youtube_open
tools.description: Open a YouTube video or search query in the default browser

tools.name: media_key
tools.description: Simulate a media key press (play_pause, next_track, prev_track, volume_up, volume_down)
